summary: An installment of the recurring 'Last Week at DHS' roundup presenting unrelated agency highlights as still photos under paragraph captions: TSA's record 3.087M-traveler screening day, a CISA Office for Bombing Prevention workshop, a CBP agriculture specialist's first-in-nation tick find at SFO air cargo, and more. Although it carries a background music bed, it is an informational newsletter-style digest with descriptive text cards rather than a stylized music-driven genre piece, so out of scope.
notable_text: TSA began the last month of a record-breaking year with December 1st marking the busiest day ever for the agency... screened 3.087M individuals; The CISA Office for Bombing Prevention hosted a Technical Assistance Program workshop; A SFO Air Cargo CBP Agricultural Specialist had a first in the nation find
